chunks.text: ley Resources The primary resources for this course are the lecture slides and homework assignments on the front page . Previous Offerings A full version of this course was offered in Fall 2022 , Fall 2021 , Fall 2020 , Fall 2019 , Fall 2018 , Fall 2
